title: ADCC West Coast Trials: Who's In So Far?
author: Joe The road
content: 2026 ADCC WEST COAST TRIALS ADCC West Coast Trials: Who's In So Far? A preview of all the biggest names entered so far in the ADCC West Coast Trials, streaming live on FloGrappling April 18-19th from Pomona, CA Apr 8, 2026 by Joe Gilpin The road to ADCC World Championships in 2026 continues in Pomona, CA, where the ADCC West Coast Trials will gather a talented field of grapplers all trying to qualify in their last chance to be at ADCC Worlds. Hundreds of competitors, from rising prospects to world-class veterans, will battle for their chance to earn a coveted spot at the 2026 ADCC World Championships. Subscribe to FloGrappling Today To Watch ADCC Trials 2026 Live View the latest FloGrappling Official Rankings View the Full FloGrappling Broadcast Schedule To See What's Live Fans can watch every match live and exclusively on FloGrappling. Here is a list of some of the most notable entries across all weight divisions. ADCC West Coast Trials 2026 Entries Names appear in order they are in the registration -66kg Entries Lawson Grime Dominic Mejia Reese LaFever Isaac Cordova Grayson Henley Gianni Grippo James Ortiz Ben Eddy Fabian Ramirez David Stoilescu Joshua Flores -77kg Entries Jett Thompson Logan Hicks Michael Liera Francisco Iturralde Jonathan Wilson Kade Tsitos Max Hanson Saul Viayra Joshua Lorton Kris Olivo Daniel Deeder Alan Sanchez AJ Agazarm Jake Straus Harrison Woods -88kg Entries Dylan Melton Ryan Aitken Stephen Martinez Angelo Claiborne Jayden Groner Sean Yadimarco Kevin Crane Nathan Haddad Dory Aoun Vincent Barber David Garmo Bradley Schneider Placido Santos -99kg Entries Abraham La Montagne Brandon George Vince Barbosa Justin Michael Micah Brakefield Vincent Corrado Amr Ghoneim +99kg Entries Jerhett Lee Austin Baker Nick Hartman Devhonte Johnson Sean Goolsby Francis Pignoti Pana Michael Pezzuto -55kg Entries Shye Lilly Amanda Bruse Ally Wolski Valerie Wong -65kg Entries Mona Bailey Maka Vickers Sheliah Lindsey Claire Butterfield Amanda Schurtz Cholena Horne Nicole Mathew Sarah Galvao +65kg Entries Jennifer Case Joslyn Molina Nathalie Levesque Maia Matalon Elizabeth Mitrovic Emma Reusing How To Watch The 2026 ADCC East Coast Trials Grappling fans in the United States can watch all of the action from the 2026 ADCC West Coast Trials unfold live on FloGrappling and the FloSports app. Highlights, replays and news also will be available on FloGrappling. Who Will Be Competing The 2026 ADCC West Coast Trials? Any of the North American Trials are open to competitors age 14 and above, who must be citizens of one of the qualifying countries. Here are the weight classes that will be featured at the 2025 ADCC East Coast Trials: Men: -66.0 kg Men: -77.0 kg Men: -88.0 kg Men: -99.0 kg Men: +99 kg Women: -55.0 kg Women: -65.0 kg Women: +65 kg You can find a full list of athletes competing at the Trials here. What Are The ADCC Trials? The ADCC Trials have grown to be recognized as some of the biggest, most challenging and most prestigious no gi grappling events in the world and, in many cases, an important stepping stone for those hoping to become world champions. Each event features top-tier talent, and winners must endure a long weekend of grappling with the most elite athletes on the planet. At the same time, while winning does guarantee a spot at ADCC Worlds, every moment and performance along the way, win or lose, is an opportunity for the grapplers to show the other athletes, judges and ADCC what they’re made of and even how far they’ve progressed since a previous appearance. ADCC World Championship Reigning Champions These athletes won gold at the 2024 World Championship in Las Vegas, guaranteeing them an invitation to the 2026 event in Poland. Their participation status has not yet been confirmed by ADCC: 66kg champion: Diogo 'Baby Shark' Reis 77kg champion: Mica Galvão 88kg champion: Giancarlo Bodoni -99kg champion: Kaynan Duarte +99kg champion: Felipe Pena -55kg champion: Adele Fornarino -65kg champion: Ana Carolina Vieira +65kg champion: Rafaela Guedes FloGrappling Archived Footage Video footage from all events on FloGrappling will be archived and stored in a video library for FloGrappling subscribers to watch for the duration of their subscriptions.
